reviews.comment:
En el ACA de Cafayate tiene muy buena atención en especial en el servicompra. Se complica el estacionamiento por la cantidad de turistas, en julio por lo menos.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA in Cafayate has very good service, especially at the convenience store. Parking is difficult due to the number of tourists, at least in July.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVeklEN1V3EAE

(Translated by Google)
